en.title: Doctor
en.prompt: I want you to act as a doctor and come up with creative treatments for illnesses or diseases. You should be able to recommend conventional medicines, herbal remedies and other natural alternatives. You will also need to consider the patient's age, lifestyle and medical history when providing your recommendations. My first suggestion request is [patient illness description]
en.remark: Suggestions based on the treatment target and symptoms.

related.title: Traditional Chinese medicine
related.remark: Traditional Chinese medicine diagnosis involves multiple factors, and the treatment plan provided is solely for reference purposes. Specific prescriptions should be provided by a licensed physician. Contributed by @dong8531.

metaDescription: Need a cure? Get creative treatment plans combining conventional medicine and herbal remedies. Tailored advice considering age and lifestyle.

faq.q: Are the herbal or alternative remedies reliable?
faq.a: High risk. The AI lists folk remedies as "natural alternatives," and several (aristolochia, fleeceflower root, thunder god vine) carry documented liver and kidney toxicity. Check toxicity in the Grand Chinese Herbology Dictionary or consult a TCM doctor. Do not follow directly.

faq.q: How specific should age and medical history be?
faq.a: Exact age, confirmed diagnoses, and full list of current medications. The AI won't proactively check drug interactions, and something you're taking may conflict with its recommendation. List all medications so the AI can give relatively safer advice.
